original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: David, Mason, Samuel, and Daniel. "If Mason is a knight then Samuel is a knave," David declared. "Mason is a knight if and only if David is a knave," Mason declared. Samuel commented, "Daniel is a knight or David is a knave". Daniel expressed that David is a knight and Samuel is a knave. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
